name: Lenovo Laptop Support (experimental)
author: Sensor Readout
description: Experimental, opt-in Lenovo laptop probe. Reads ThinkPad fan WMI where exposed, ACPI fan presence, ACPI thermal zones, Lenovo thermal modes and thermal driver presence, ACPI battery WMI, IdeaPad Lenovo_BatteryInformation, thermal throttle state, system thermal state, storage health/temperature/wear, and Lenovo vendor WMI details.
